description_long: This is a modern digital piano with a sleek, rectangular body finished in black. The keyboard features a full set of white and black keys, arranged in the standard piano layout, and is bordered by a thin, slightly raised edge. The top surface is flat and unadorned, with no visible music stand or control panel, giving it a minimalist appearance. The sides and back are solid and boxy, with no visible pedals or additional components. The keys are slightly recessed into the body, and the front edge is subtly beveled. The overall design suggests portability and contemporary styling, suitable for urban environments such as music schools, public spaces, or street performances.
description: A sleek, black digital piano with a full keyboard and minimalist, rectangular design. The keys are recessed and the body is flat and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard layout with all white and black keys visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's narrow depth and the slight recess of the keys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unbroken back panel with no visible controls or pedals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the edge of the keyboard.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in the traditional arrangement, no split or missing keys.
